reviews.review_description: Man this was my favorite game…could you please follow the policies so we can play again:)
I love this game but it no longer follows meta polices. Please fix this
Please bring back Cotton Eyed Joe level and add new ones

This game is wonderful and while I'm not big on the drums part, I love the kareoke and shooting sections (and that beautiful planetary view from your home penthouse). I haven't sang with anyone on multiplayer yet, but I plan to soon. Because I don't believe a lot of people are using this game or not at the same time at least, your better joining with someone familiar until a community starts developing if your hoping to sing with people.

A few points:
-There are very little glitches, which is nice. But sometimes my avatar arm/shoulder stays in my vision unless I jank it around or reset view
- I would love to be able to pick up my microphone in my hand to sing with (even if there is no other effect but holding the mike-its like when you grab a remote to sing into, it doesnt do anything but you feel like a star)
-Unless i'm missing the option, avatars so far only have 1 skin tone, which is white. Having more customization options (i:e, skin tone) would be wonderful.

One of the tracks was just a bit different,smh
Cotton eyed joe track just doesn’t fit today

developer_response.body: Hi I'm sorry that song makes you uncomfortable, Thanks for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: Maybe the game is old but this game is dope I haven’t heard of at all the shooter is the best tho

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support!

reviews.review_description:
Hello There!

Thank you all for supporting StarMaker VR and want to give it a try!

It's not perfect yet, so we want your feedback and help us to make it better!

Please give us reviews with suggestions anywhere you want! 

-Join StarMaker VR discord
-Social Media @StarMaker VR
Or just write it down here!

Thank you! We love you all!

I'm on original starmaker app would be sweet to get my profile on here as have so so many songs already done.  Love the fact you added so many games and this time no gambling like the original app good job so far. From a starmaker official  user I'm looking forward  to seeing yalls  potential

developer_response.body:
Thanks for focusing on our VR edition. 

Actually, we have planed to combine our VR app with our Mobile edition. But we have a lot of things to do before we achieve it. We are doing something for helping singer to create more epic production and improve our social experience. I  hope we could create the Next-Gen singing experience together. 

If you have any suggestion, please let us know. 

Thanks again for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: This is great so far.  Needs more features and a few adjustments on some songs but overall a good experience ! The audio is nicely synced  ! If you scream, the vocals don't distort. This game needs more attention!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support! Don't forget to sing with friends in Party! We hope you have a good time in StarMaker VR!

reviews.review_description:
*Shooting Star
As a fan of Pistol Whip i like this "fork"/variety..
But I would prefer a pistol not feeling like mini shot gun (size, sound expression)..
More songs would be also fine..
I've got it for free, however I would pay for full Shooting Star game with similar complexity as Pistol Whip has.

*Blade Star - not fan of Beat Saber short swingig hands, but I like to play Blade Star by/with my whole body rather, that makes more fun! I'm still learning right timing/distance/position.. More environments would be fine, more songs too..

*Taiko Star - I did not enjoy it much, I will try again later..
*Sing Star - cannot evaluate (not keen on singing)
*Talking guide is not necessary..

developer_response.body:
We are happy that you love the games.

I have got your views on the Shooting Star. You are so meticulous! Our designers would start to optimize the gun model and sound effect. 

I would like to heard more suggestions from you.

Thanks for your reviews.

reviews.review_title: Thanks so much . Never thought I'd Sing
reviews.review_description: Began Learning via the Mobile App . Enjoying the VR version . Can't wait to PARTY Live .

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for attending our event! You did a really great job!

reviews.review_description: I like it it’s fun but I wish I can link my StarMaker Karaoke account to the StarMaker vr

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for your support! We are working on this, please stay tuned to our next version in February!

reviews.review_description:
So happy that you put starmaker on VR. I would love to be able to combine my starmaker profiles on my mobile phone to the starmaker VR and interact on both formats.
It would be nice if you had something somewhere that told you how much this app will cost whether it will be a one-time charge or a monthly charge.

developer_response.body:
Great to hear from you!
Yes! Our target is to create more immersive social experience and more immersive singing experience. So we are planing to make some combination between mobile and vr. But it still have a lot of challenge. 
Thanks for your focus on our vr edition and we will do our best on vr.

reviews.review_title: I AM REALLY EXCITED ABOUT THIS
reviews.review_description:
I have been singing on your karaoke app for well over 5 years now and am happy to pay for my vip membership.  It would be incredible if you could find a way to merge our profiles on both platforms.  

I think the other games are great too!!  I had my free trial and I am ready to purchase it but cannot find any way

developer_response.body:
OKay, thanks for your feedback. 

I agree with your suggestion. Actually, we have planed to combine our VR app with our Mobile edition. But we have a lot of things to do before we achieve it. We are doing something for helping singer to create more epic production and improve our social experience. I  hope we could create the Next-Gen singing experience together. 

If you have any suggestion, please let us know. 

Thanks again for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Okay so I'm going to give this four stars for now I think this game has lots of potential for people that love music. But can't wait to see what it's going to be like in the future keep on going.

   Also I think I read something on here that said this app is going to be paid is it going to be paid now. 😭

   And another question is this the same star maker that's on android singing platform because I have that app on my phone is that the same company or yeah.



But all in all tried this game out it was fun especially the shooting with the music but I think you will need to turn down like have a volume thing to turn down like the shooting cuz it's hard to hear the music with all the gun shooting. But yeah just keep on working it has lots of potential guys and thank you for making this app. 



 Update okay this is another update not been 10 seconds before I posted this what I think what people would like is to have like a voice trainer for everyday voice training like I don't care if it's paid or not I think people would love that to have like a trainer into like actually see them in front of you I don't know hence you hopefully you get the idea.

My email: viper699620@gmail.com

developer_response.body:
Good suggestions and ideas!

Could you tell us more detail about the voice trainer. Do you mean that you want to have a voice trainer to tech you how to sing?

reviews.review_description: I just played for first time today. I used to love SingStar on my friend's playstation. So happy to see it on here. The drumming and shooting game are my new favorite games. Its a workout without feeling like I'm working out. I could play for hours just like the old Rock Band video game. I hope if this releases that the music library stays as large and open and not behind paywall per song.  The demo for shooting game could be better to explain what do to. After a few tries in actual game I think I have it because I made it to the end.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We are glad to hear that you had a good time in StarMaker VR!
